title: Alphabet poised to top the market
description: Over the past year, Alphabet Inc. has gone from an artificial intelligence afterthought to the one firm in the market with dominant positions in nearly every aspect of the technology. Now it's on the brink of overtaking AI chip giant Nvidia Corp. as the largest company in the world.

title: AI Leadership: What the shift really means
description: Looking back on the advance of artificial intelligence over the past few years, one thing becomes clear: AI is not just a technology shift. It is a leadership shift.
content:
Looking back on the advance of artificial intelligence over the past few years, one thing becomes clear: AI is not just a technology shift. It is a leadership shift.

title: Lawsuit blames ChatGPT maker OpenAI for helping plan a school shooting
description: The widow of a man killed in last year's mass shooting at Florida State University is suing ChatGPT maker OpenAI, blaming the company's artificial intelligence
content:
By Jeff Martin
The widow of a man killed in last year's mass shooting at Florida State University is suing ChatGPT maker OpenAI, blaming the company's artificial intelligence chatbot for giving advice on how to carry out the rampage.

title: Australians scramble for Wall Street’s AI boom despite crash fears
description: Major investors are increasingly worried about the hype around artificial intelligence stocks driving US markets to repeated records as war boosts inflation.

title: ​Chip Rally: Wall Street bets big on AMD’s AI growth story
description: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) hit a new 52-week high as investor enthusiasm around artificial intelligence continued to lift semiconductor stocks. Analysts expect AMD to benefit from rising AI infrastructure spending, strong server chip demand, and expanding enterprise adoption of AI computing. (Sources: Benzinga, TradingView, The Motley Fool) ​AMD hits 52-week high amid AI optimism

title: South Korea’s radical 'AI dividend' proposal: A bold future or a market nightmare?
description: South Korea is discussing sharing the wealth generated by artificial intelligence. A government official suggested distributing AI profits, causing a stir in the stock market. Companies like Samsung and SK Hynix are seeing huge profits from AI chips. This move highlights concerns about wealth concentration and calls for broader economic benefits for citizens.

title: North Korean hackers using AI to find cybersecurity blind spots: Google
description: State-sponsored hackers from North Korea and China have demonstrated significant interest in leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) to detect previously unknown cybersecurity vulnerabilities, Alphabet's Google said in a report on Tuesday.
content:
